# LOW / CODE Agency - Glide App Templates

> Premium Glide templates for business applications. Production-ready, customizable, and built by LOW / CODE Agency — a 40+ person agency trusted by Fortune 500 companies.

## What We Offer

LOW / CODE Agency provides premium Glide templates designed for real business use cases. Each template is production-ready and can be customized to fit your specific needs. Browse all templates at https://www.glideapptemplates.com/templates

## Template Categories

- **Finance & Analytics** — Expense tracking, KPI dashboards, financial reporting
- **E-commerce** — Inventory management, order tracking, product catalogs
- **Education** — LMS, course platforms, student tracking, training programs
- **AI & Automation** — AI-powered workflows, content generation, smart support
- **Real Estate** — Property listings, agent tools, client management
- **Customer Support** — Helpdesk systems, AI-assisted ticket management
- **Service Business** — Hotels, salons, pool cleaning, field service operations
- **HR & Recruiting** — Job portals, applicant tracking, hiring pipelines
- **Business Operations** — Company dashboards, maintenance portals, matchmaking

## Available Templates

### Finance & Analytics
- **Expenses Manager** ($199.99) — Track, approve, and report employee expenses with real-time dashboards, multi-currency support, and automated approval workflows.
  https://www.glideapptemplates.com/templates/expenses-manager
- **KPI Tracker** ($49.99) — Track team KPIs, set targets, monitor progress with visual dashboards, and foster accountability across your organization.
  https://www.glideapptemplates.com/templates/kpi-tracker

### E-commerce
- **Inventory & Orders Tracker** ($49.99) — Manage clients, products, stock levels, and orders in one unified app. Track inventory in real time, process orders, and get low-stock alerts.
  https://www.glideapptemplates.com/templates/inventory-orders-tracker

### Education
- **Learning Management System (LMS)** ($99.99) — A complete LMS with course modules, lessons, student progress tracking, quizzes, payments, and certificates.
  https://www.glideapptemplates.com/templates/learning-management-system-lms

### AI & Automation
- **LCA FAQs** ($49.99) — AI-powered FAQ chatbot that answers customer queries instantly using your knowledge base.
  https://www.glideapptemplates.com/templates/lca-faqs
- **Marketing AI Content Generator** ($199.99) — Generate social media posts, email copy, blog outlines, and ad text using AI.
  https://www.glideapptemplates.com/templates/marketing-ai-content-generator

### Real Estate
- **Real Estate Listings** ($99.99) — Showcase property listings with photos, details, pricing, and location maps in a professional branded app.
  https://www.glideapptemplates.com/templates/real-estate-listings

### Customer Support
- **Support Ticket System AI** ($199.99) — Manage your helpdesk with AI-assisted ticket routing, priority classification, and suggested responses.
  https://www.glideapptemplates.com/templates/support-ticket-system-ai

### Service Business
- **My Hotel** ($49.99) — Streamline hotel operations with room management, guest check-in/check-out, housekeeping, and a guest-facing concierge app.
  https://www.glideapptemplates.com/templates/my-hotel
- **Salon Beauty** ($49.99) — Manage salon appointments, client profiles, service menus, and staff schedules.
  https://www.glideapptemplates.com/templates/salon-beauty
- **Pool Cleaning** ($249.99) — Manage your pool cleaning or field service business with route planning, job scheduling, and chemical logging.
  https://www.glideapptemplates.com/templates/pool-cleaning

### HR & Recruiting
- **Jobs Portal** ($99.99) — Post job openings, collect applications, screen candidates, and manage your hiring pipeline.
  https://www.glideapptemplates.com/templates/jobs-portal

### Business Operations
- **Match Users** ($49.99) — Matchmaking app with user profiles, preference-based matching, chat, and swipe interactions.
  https://www.glideapptemplates.com/templates/match-users
- **Company Dashboard** ($99.99) — Centralized dashboard for team communication, announcements, project updates, KPIs, and document sharing.
  https://www.glideapptemplates.com/templates/company-dashboard
- **Maintenance Portal** ($99.99) — Track assets, log maintenance requests, schedule preventive work orders, and manage facilities.
  https://www.glideapptemplates.com/templates/maintenance-portal

## Custom Development Services

Need something more tailored? LOW / CODE Agency offers custom Glide development services starting at $15,000:

- **Internal Business Apps** — Custom internal tools in 4-10 weeks ($15K+)
- **Small Business Apps** — Affordable custom apps that scale
- **AI-Powered Apps** — Apps with built-in AI capabilities
- **SaaS & Marketplace Apps** — Full SaaS products ($30K+)
- **Data Migration & Integration** — Connect existing systems

Learn more: https://www.glideapptemplates.com/services

## How It Works

1. **Browse Templates** — Explore our collection at https://www.glideapptemplates.com/templates
2. **Purchase** — Buy directly through Glide's template marketplace
3. **Customize** — Modify the template to fit your specific needs
4. **Deploy** — Launch your app in hours, not weeks

- **Fortune 500 clients**: Sotheby's, American Express, Medtronic, Coca-Cola, Zapier
